content:
Fiverr Marketplace Alert
There’s growing concern about Tilapia Group allegedly operating multiple Fiverr accounts and using staff contracts to make it look legal.

Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Why this matters:
1. Fiverr TOS: Multiple accounts per group/company are not allowed without Fiverr’s permission.
2. Local risk: If platform rules are broken at scale, it can put Fiverr’s access in Bangladesh at risk.
What we can do:
Raise awareness. If you have information or concerns, document them and report through official Fiverr channels. Silence won’t fix it.
We don’t want to lose access to a platform thousands of Bangladeshi freelancers depend on.
Please share this and keep the
conversation respectful and factual.
#Fiverr #BangladeshFreelancers
#Freelancing #FiverrTOS
